title: ortholoma dictyophyllum
intro: Ortholoma dictyophyllum is a plant species that is also known as Dictamnus dictyophyllum, commonly referred to as the 'spider flower' due to its distinctive white or yellowish flowers resembling a spider's web. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ortholoma dictyophyllum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of allergies. Ortholoma dictyophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
